personal.title: Computer Science Engineering Student
personal.headline: Aspiring Full Stack Developer | AI & Software Engineering Enthusiast

about.short: Hi, I'm Vivan Pandya, a Computer Science Engineering student passionate about Full Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, and Software Engineering. I enjoy building modern, scalable, and user-focused web applications while continuously learning new technologies.
about.medium: I am a Computer Science Engineering student at Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU). My primary interests include Full Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, and System Design. I enjoy solving real-world problems by building practical applications and continuously improving my technical skills through projects and hands-on learning.
about.long: I am a Computer Science Engineering student at Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) with a strong passion for designing scalable software solutions and modern web applications. My areas of interest include Full Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, Backend Development, Software Architecture, Databases, and System Design. I enjoy learning by building projects that solve practical problems while following clean code practices, modular architecture, and industry standards. My goal is to continuously grow as a software engineer and contribute to impactful products while expanding my expertise in AI-powered applications.

careerObjective.short: To become a skilled Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in AI-powered applications and scalable software systems.
careerObjective.long: My long-term goal is to build innovative software products that combine Artificial Intelligence with modern Full Stack Development. I aim to continuously improve my technical expertise, contribute to meaningful projects, and work in collaborative engineering environments where I can solve challenging real-world problems.
